landing.heroPrefix: If you moved tomorrow, do you remember
landing.heroDescription: Tax refunds, court summons, jury duty notices, insurance checks, replacement debit cards, prescription refills — all delivered to the address on file. LocateFlow tracks every account tied to your home, so when you move, nothing slips through.
landing.productDefinition: LocateFlow is a moving and address-change command center that helps you track providers, utilities, subscriptions, documents, reminders, and tasks tied to every address.
landing.scope_strip_manual_body: Track each step locally. We don't call your providers, but we won't let you forget one.
landing.scope_strip_directory_body: Use directory guidance, then confirm details with the provider before you act.
landing.scope_strip_devices_body: Plan from your laptop. Check off from the U-Haul. Same data, same checklist.
landing.section_features_subtitle: Bank, insurance, IRS, DMV, HOA, gym, streaming. One list per home.
landing.feature_services_body: Add each provider once and track billing dates, contract ends, and last-paid amounts across every home you live in. The list you can never quite recall when you actually need it.
landing.feature_moving_title: Nothing slips through on moving day
landing.feature_moving_body: When the day comes, your service list becomes a checklist. Transfer, cancel, or update each one — without the 3 a.m. realization that you forgot the storage unit.
landing.feature_budget_body: The gym you haven't visited in eight months. The streaming bundle still charging a card you cancelled. We surface every recurring charge so you stop paying for things you forgot.
landing.feature_community_body: Provider directory guidance and notes by location. Confirm details with the provider before you act.
landing.feature_reminders_body: Renewal date coming up? Auto-pay fails on a card you cancelled? Contract renews while you're on vacation? Reminders reach you in time to act.
landing.feature_documents_body: Lease, last bill, proof of address — stored against the address they belong to. Searchable the moment the IRS, landlord, or insurance asks.
landing.risk_title: What goes to your old address
landing.risk_subtitle: Every move leaves a paper trail. The pieces that get lost aren't the obvious ones.
landing.risk_legal_body: Jury duty summons. Subpoenas. Eviction notices. Missing one isn't an inconvenience — it's a default judgment.
landing.risk_finance_body: W-2s, 1099s, IRS refund checks, replacement debit cards. The mail USPS forwarding can't always catch.
landing.risk_govt_body: License renewals, immigration notices, SSA statements. They expire quietly if you don't see them.
landing.risk_health_body: Lab results, EOBs, prescription refills, claim checks. Sent to the address each provider has on file.
landing.risk_daily_body: Online orders, HOA dues, security-deposit refunds, subscription cancellations. Lots of small leaks.
landing.step_1_body: One dashboard per home you live in or used to.
landing.step_2_body: Bank, insurance, utility, subscription — pick a category, save in seconds.
landing.step_3_body: Billing dates, contract ends, renewal flags. Before they become a problem.
landing.step_4_title: Move with a checklist, not a panic
landing.step_4_body: When the day comes, every account becomes a one-click task. Transfer, cancel, update.
landing.scope_subtitle: We organize the calls and forms. You make them — we just make sure you don't miss any.
landing.scope_track_body: Most people remember three or four accounts when they move. They discover the rest months later — through late fees, missed mail, or fraud alerts.
landing.scope_provider_body: Listed providers and location-aware guidance. Confirm details with the provider before you act - we don't call them for you.
landing.scope_devices_body: Same data on web and mobile. Plan from your laptop. Check off from the U-Haul.
landing.mobile_title: Your service list in your pocket
landing.mobile_body: The U-Haul cab is not where you want to remember the storage unit, the gym membership, or the prescription refill going to your old place. Snap a bill, get a renewal nudge, check your monthly spend without leaving the couch.
landing.mobile_bullet_1: Same data as web — addresses, services, providers in sync.
landing.mobile_bullet_2: Email and in-app reminders before auto-renew, ready to check off on any device.
landing.mobile_bullet_3: Document scanning for bills, receipts, and proof of address.
landing.family_subtitle: Invite your household or team and manage members and roles in one place — each person's data stays private to them.
landing.family_feature_invite_body: Send a secure invitation. Members join with one click and can leave whenever they want.
landing.family_feature_roles_body: Owner, admin, member, child, and view-only roles control who can see and change what.
landing.family_feature_together_body: Add members, assign roles, and coordinate moves together — without exposing anyone's private data.
landing.connector_title: Update once. We help with the rest.
landing.connector_subtitle: For supported partners you authorize, LocateFlow can submit your new address on your behalf; otherwise we guide you to the right update path.
landing.connector_feature_authorize_body: Connect a partner with a secure sign-in. LocateFlow never sees your partner passwords.
landing.connector_feature_submit_body: When an API-backed partner is connected, LocateFlow sends the update. When it is not, we help you open and complete the partner flow yourself.
landing.connector_feature_control_body: Review every connection in settings and revoke access whenever you want.
landing.connector_disclaimer: Sync runs only for supported partners you connect and authorize. Without a supported API connection, LocateFlow provides guided open-and-update steps instead.
landing.trust_retention: Export and deletion tools available in settings
landing.footer_tagline: Made with care for movers everywhere.
landing.recognition_title_b: One person trying to remember it all.
landing.recognition_body: It's not laziness. It's volume. The average household is in business with 30+ companies, half of them on autopay you set up so long ago you've forgotten which credit card.
landing.stats_title: The cost of forgetting, in receipts.
landing.stat_subs_label: Average household spend per year on subscriptions they don't use.
landing.stat_movers_label: Movers continue paying utility bills at their previous address.
landing.stat_households_label: US households move every year. Most do it three or more times.
landing.mm_title_a: Moving is when LocateFlow pays for
landing.mm_body: Your service list becomes a one-tap checklist. State-specific rules for all 50 US states — what you can transfer, what you must cancel, what needs reconnecting before day one.
landing.mm_bullet_4: No more "wait, did I cancel that?"
landing.bili_body: 62 million US Hispanic adults are 1.6× more likely to relocate than the general population. They're not an afterthought — they're our wedge. Every screen, every reminder, every checklist step ships in both languages.
landing.quote_attribution: Maria L · Moved 4 times in 6 years

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when LocateFlow saves you money.
pricing.individualDescription: For one person keeping every service tied to their addresses in sync.
pricing.familyDescription: Households moving together. One workspace, every member, every service.
pricing.familyHint: Drops as soon as the family workspace is ready.
pricing.proDescription: Power users and portfolios with guided partner updates, stronger audit history, and higher limits.
pricing.proFeature2: Address labels and stronger verification workflows
pricing.proFeature4: Partner Hub: supported API sync or guided open-and-update
pricing.proHint: Flagship tier — API sync opens only as supported partners are approved.
pricing.scopeNoteBody: Today, LocateFlow tracks tasks, providers, and your move locally. Family and Pro will unlock household sharing, guided partner updates, verified identity, and higher limits. Subscribe to the waitlist on the Individual plan to get them first.
pricing.compareSubtitle: Where you start today, what unlocks as Family and Pro come online.
pricing.compareDisclaimer: Family and Pro tiers are in development. Pricing and features will be finalized at launch — Individual subscribers get first access.
pricing.faq_trial_q: How does the free trial work?
pricing.faq_trial_a: Trial length, price, renewal date, and whether a payment method is required are shown at checkout before you agree. Some offers require a payment method and renew automatically unless canceled.
pricing.faq_cancel_a: You can cancel supported web subscriptions from Settings or the Stripe billing portal. App Store and Google Play subscriptions are managed through the applicable store.
pricing.faq_refund_a: Refund eligibility depends on the Refund Policy, the offer shown at checkout, and the rules of Apple App Store or Google Play for store purchases.
pricing.faq_data_a: LocateFlow uses access controls, encryption practices, and privacy tools. Exports and deletion requests are available, but backups, billing, audit, legal, and security records may be retained when needed.

auth.signUp_subtitle: Start managing every service tied to your address.
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to finish creating your account.
auth.verifiedDescription: You're all set. Redirecting you to the dashboard…
auth.verificationFailedDescription: The link is invalid or expired. Request a new verification email.
auth.forgotPassword_subtitle: Enter the email you used to sign up. We'll send you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotPassword_sentDescription: If an account exists, we sent password reset instructions.
auth.resetPassword_subtitle: Pick a password with at least 12 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit, and one special character.
auth.resetPassword_successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPassword_invalid: This reset link is invalid or expired.
auth.setupPasswordSubtitle: Add a password now so you can sign in with email and password as well as Google or Apple.
auth.setupPasswordHelper: Use at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
auth.mfaRequired_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.error_locked: Too many failed attempts. Please wait and try again.
auth.error_unavailable: Login temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
auth.error_provider_disabled: This sign-in method is currently unavailable.
auth.error_oauth_email_unverified: Your Google account email could not be verified. Try another sign-in method.
auth.error_account_setup: We could not finish setting up your social sign-in account. Please try again in a minute.
auth.error_account_unavailable: This account is unavailable. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
auth.error_session_create: Your account was found, but we could not start a session. Please try again.
auth.error_logout_failed: We could not fully sign you out. Please try again.
auth.error_generic: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth.mustAgree: You must accept the terms to continue.
auth.legalAcceptanceRequired: You will review and accept the Terms of Use and Legal Disclaimer during onboarding.
auth.legalAcknowledgementsDescription: You will review these before using LocateFlow.
auth.oauthReadinessNote: Email and password sign-up is ready now. Social sign-in will be enabled after admin OAuth credentials are added.
auth.oauthReadinessSignInNote: Password sign-in is available now. Social sign-in will be enabled after admin OAuth credentials are added.
auth.signUpLegalReviewNotice: You will review and accept LocateFlow Terms and Legal Disclaimer before using the app.
auth.verifyEmailSentPrefix: We sent a verification link to
auth.verifyEmailSentSuffix: Verify your email before opening the app.
auth.verifyEmailSignInFirst: Sign in with the account you just created, then verify your email before opening the app.
auth.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

addresses.formSubtitle: Enter the details of your address
addresses.nicknameHint: A short label like "Main home" or "Beach house".
addresses.basicInfoDescription: What kind of address is this?
addresses.deleteConfirm: Delete this address and all its services?
addresses.deleteDescription: This removes the address and every service tied to it. This cannot be undone.
addresses.detail_noServices: No services registered to this address.
addresses.detail_dangerDescription: Deleting this address will remove all {count, plural, =0 {associated services} =1 {1 associated service} other {# associated services}}. This cannot be undone.

emptyStates.addFirstService: Add your first service to start tracking.
emptyStates.tryDifferentFilter: Can't find your provider in our directory? Add it manually — we'll review and add it to the system if valid.

coverage.label: Coverage
coverage.localDesc: Only at this address. Stays in your private records.
coverage.statewideDesc: Serves this state. We'll review and may add it to the directory.
coverage.nationwideDesc: Serves the whole country. We'll review and may add it to the directory.
coverage.stateRequired: Statewide coverage needs an address with a state. Switch the selected address or pick another coverage.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Provider directory near you, with confidence notes.

moving.title: Moving Plans
moving.subtitle: Transfer, cancel, or reconnect with one click.
moving.moveDateHint: We'll remind you 7, 3, and 1 days before.
moving.checklistEmpty: Your checklist is empty. Add services to generate steps.
moving.addressesSectionDescription: We'll auto-select your current address as the origin and create the destination in the same flow.
moving.originHint: Your primary or most recent address is selected automatically when available.
moving.noSecondAddress: You don't have a second saved address yet, so we'll create the destination as part of this plan.
moving.afterCreate: After creating your plan, we'll open it immediately with auto-generated checklist tasks, service migration guidance, and state-aware next steps.
moving.addCurrentAddressFirstDescription: Your current address is used as the move origin before we can build a moving plan.
moving.addCurrentAddressFirstHelp: Create your current address once, then you can plan moves to saved or brand-new destinations.
moving.errorSelectOrigin: Select an origin address to start your moving plan.
moving.errorSelectDestination: Select a destination address or switch to entering a new one.
moving.errorDestinationFields: Enter destination city, state, and ZIP code.
moving.errorStateLength: Destination state must be a 2-letter code.
moving.errorPlanNotCreated: Moving plan could not be created.
moving.daysUntilMove: {days, plural, one {# day until move} other {# days until move}}
moving.interstateMoveFocus: Prioritize DMV, voter registration, taxes, and provider switches across state lines.
moving.intrastateMoveFocus: Focus on utilities, local provider transfers, and address updates within the same state.
moving.migrationGuidanceEmpty: Migration guidance appears after we analyze services on your origin address.

budget.title: Budget

settings.title: Settings
settings.notifications_reminderDays: Remind me this many days ahead
settings.privacy_description: Control how your data is handled.
settings.privacy_doNotSell: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
settings.privacy_doNotSell_description: California, Colorado, Connecticut, and Virginia residents can opt out of data sale or sharing under state privacy laws.
settings.privacy_doNotSell_on: You've opted out. Your data is not sold or shared.
settings.privacy_doNotSell_off: Data sharing is allowed. Toggle on to opt out.
settings.export_description: Download a copy of everything tied to your account.
settings.delete_description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.delete_confirmDescription: Type DELETE to confirm. Active account records will be removed where supported. Some backups, billing records, audit logs, legal records, and security records may be retained when needed.
settings.twoFactor_enabledDescription: Your account is protected with an authenticator app
settings.twoFactor_disabledDescription: Your account is only protected by a password
settings.twoFactor_required: Two-factor enrollment is required for your role
settings.twoFactor_requiredDescription: SUPER_ADMIN accounts must enroll MFA before accessing the rest of the admin panel.

showBudget.label: Show budget & service costs
showBudget.description: Show the Budget tab in the sidebar and surface monthly cost fields
